query: I want to add a new section to the about page that shows our team or something, like a grid of the photographers we work with
the investment page CTA button is linking to /pricing instead of /contact, can you fix that and make sure the rest of the links on that page are correct too
let's redesign the blog listing page, right now it looks really generic and doesn't match the editorial vibe of the rest of the site
can you build a new location guide page for Scarborough Bluffs? We shot there last week and I want it on the site with all the SEO stuff
the testimonial cards on mobile are overlapping the footer, there's some CSS issue happening with the spacing
I need you to implement an inquiry form that sends to Formspree and has fields for date, venue, package interest, and a message
add a video section to the portfolio detail pages that embeds the YouTube film if the couple has one, using the existing YouTubeEmbed component
let's make the header sticky on scroll with a background blur effect, and it should be transparent at the top of the page
the gallery lightbox is broken on safari, images are showing at the wrong aspect ratio and the close button is hidden behind the notch
I want to add structured data for all our service pages so google shows rich snippets with pricing
select the best 15 images from the Mitali and Purv shoot, the raw exports are in ~/Desktop/exports/mitali-purv/
pick a cover photo for the Anushka and Anthony gallery, I want something portrait orientation that shows both of them
write a blog post about the Shuba and Rob session at Evergreen Brick Works
can you check which A/B test cover is winning for the Priyanka Saurav gallery
compress all the images in the meghna-puneeth folder to web size, keep them under 40KB each
generate the story copy for the alex and aziz gallery, I need the headline and pull quote for the portfolio page
tag the mania hitesh gallery with the right categories and mood tags based on the images
update the instagram grid on the homepage with the 6 best shots from our recent galleries
can you commit these changes and push them up, I think we're good to deploy
write me a Claude API app that takes a photo and generates a caption for it using vision
